etymology.description: 艸 (grass; plant) + 合 (phonetic) = plant-related meaning with 合 for sound -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅 combines the semantic element 艸(艸) (cǎo, 'grass; plant'), indicating a relation to plant life or a similar concept, with the phonetic element 合(合) (hé, 'combine'), contributing to its pronunciation and suggesting the act of combining or joining in argument, leading to the meaning 'reply.'
